description_long: This office building features a rectangular footprint with a flat, light gray roof and a beige facade. The main elevations are adorned with large, vertically oriented windows set in regular rows, separated by prominent pilasters and topped with arched window headers, giving the structure a stately appearance. The ground floor includes several recessed entryways and large glass doors, suggesting multiple access points for occupants and visitors. The rear and side facades are more utilitarian, with smaller, irregularly spaced windows and minimal ornamentation. The roof includes several mechanical structures and skylights, indicating internal utility spaces. The overall design is symmetrical and formal, with a blend of modern and neoclassical architectural elements.
description: A large, beige office building with a flat roof, arched windows, and prominent pilasters, featuring multiple glass entryways and a symmetrical facade.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a plain beige wall with small, irregularly spaced windows and minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_1: This side view displays a row of tall, arched windows and pilasters, with a small rooftop structure and minimal ground-level detail.
description_view_2: The main facade features two rows of large, arched windows, prominent pilasters, and several recessed glass entryways at street level.
description_view_3: This side view highlights additional arched windows, a rooftop skylight, and several ground-level entrances, including a large central doorway.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, vertically aligned arched windows in rows, separated by pilasters, with smaller windows on the rear facade.
attribute_building_entrance_type: recessed entry with double glass doors
